calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Dowling #5388.

Petitioner Jinshen Lin and Yinhao He (parents) were present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the Minors Xingjing Lin and Zi Xuan Lin, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minors to Julie Xingjin Lin and King Zixuan Lin.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
